title: mentha royleana var. glabra
intro: Mentha royleana var. glabra, also known as the glabrous mint, is a variant of the Mentha royleana plant species, which is a type of perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions such as digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Mentha royleana var. glabra include reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and providing relief from menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
